summary: Comprehensive testing of French retirement analysis website completed successfully. All backend APIs functional, frontend UI working correctly, and integration between frontend and backend verified.
passed_tests: API root endpoint (/api) returns correct message
Contact form submission (/api/contact) stores data successfully
Retirement simulator (/api/simulate) calculates estimates correctly for multiple scenarios
Articles list endpoint (/api/articles) returns all 13 articles with complete structure
Specific article endpoint (/api/articles/{slug}) returns correct article content
404 handling for nonexistent articles works properly
Homepage loads with hero section and '15000 personnes accompagnées' badge
Navigation menu contains all required links (Problème, Solution, Simulateur, Offres, Blog, Contact)
Retirement simulator with 3 sliders (age, years, income) works and displays results
Pricing section displays 3 cards with correct prices (9€, 29€, 150€)
All Stripe payment links are correctly configured
Contact form accepts input and submits successfully
Article pages load with proper content and navigation
Disclaimer section is present with proper warning text
